arguments.final_answer:
Added histogram metric type:
- pkg/metrics/histogram.go: Histogram with configurable buckets, Observe() to record values, Percentile(p) using sorted values, Count() and Sum(). Thread-safe with sync.Mutex.
- pkg/metrics/histogram_test.go: 3 tests for observe+count, percentile accuracy (p50/p90/p99), and sum.
All tests pass.
